title: Payment Orchestration Platform
description: Multi-provider payment platform with smart routing, retries and reconciliation, processing 2M+ transactions monthly.
architecture: Event-driven microservices behind an API gateway; sagas coordinate payment flows; outbox pattern guarantees delivery.
challenges: Exactly-once semantics across flaky third-party provider APIs.
solutions: Idempotency keys plus a transactional outbox and provider-specific retry budgets.
lessons: Design for provider failure first; happy paths are the easy 20%.

title: Fleet Radar
description: Real-time fleet tracking with live maps, geofencing and dispatch optimization for 2,000+ vehicles.
architecture: WebSocket fan-out service pushes position streams; NgRx normalizes entities client-side; map layer virtualizes markers.
challenges: Rendering 2,000 moving markers at 60fps on mid-range hardware.
solutions: Canvas-based marker layer with viewport culling and delta updates.
lessons: Push less data, interpolate more — the network is the bottleneck.

title: ngx-formkit (Open Source)
description: Schema-driven dynamic forms library for Angular with typed validation and 40+ field components.
architecture: Signal-based form engine; schema compiles to a reactive control tree; renderers are swappable per design system.
challenges: Keeping full type inference from schema to submitted value.
solutions: Recursive conditional types map the schema to a typed value object at compile time.
lessons: API ergonomics decide adoption more than feature count.

title: Insight AI Assistant
description: LLM-powered analytics assistant that turns natural-language questions into governed SQL over a data warehouse.
architecture: RAG over schema metadata; generated SQL runs through a policy engine before execution; results stream to the client.
challenges: Preventing the model from generating unsafe or expensive queries.
solutions: AST-level SQL validation with allow-listed tables and cost estimation gates.
lessons: Treat model output as untrusted user input, always.
